description: Retrieve the LLM response text from a specific turn in a sub-session. Use this to get the final reply of a call_llm or batch_llm sub-task after it has completed. Returns the assistant's full text response for the requested turn. If the turn or session doesn't exist, returns an error. Tip: sub_session_id and turn_id are returned by call_llm (sync/async) and written to batch_llm's pipeline JSON file.
name: get_llm_result

session_id.description: Required. The sub-session ID returned by call_llm (or written to pipeline JSON by batch_llm)

turn_id.description: Required. The turn ID returned by call_llm (or written to pipeline JSON by batch_llm)
